mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notices ( title, content, created_at, updated_at, pinned ) VALUES( #{title}, #{content}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{pinned} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, pinned FROM notices
SELECT id, title, content, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, pinned FROM notices WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, title, content, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, pinned FROM notices WHERE pinned = true
SELECT id, title, content, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, pinned FROM notices ORDER BY pinned DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
